settings.title: MONITOR MOUNT
settings.subtitle: (Optional monitor mounts - not included with frame)

settings.title: TRAK RACER TR80S
settings.subtitle: PRO-AM RACING COCKPIT with formula & gt hybrid pedal plate
settings.description:
The TR80S offers the most features in the range, with a small footprint. The TR80S was the first rig in the industry to offer a Formula/GT Hybrid Pedal Plate as standard and includes expected accessories such as a seat slider and rigid shifter mount. From 2008 we have learnt a lot in the sim rig space to give beginner and professional sim racers exactly what they need, for the right price.

Trak Racer cockpits use thicker aluminium profile walls than the competition and include heavier duty brackets and a better-designed chassis for extra rigidity in the wheel mount uprights. It's Strong, Extremely Adjustable, and has a huge list of available accessories. In the usual Trak Racer way, we gathered customer feedback from thousands of customers to develop the TR80S.

settings.title: PEDAL MOUNT
settings.subtitle: Formula & gt hybrid PEDAL MOUNT
settings.description: The TR80S V6 has been improved to withstand hundreds of kilograms in braking force without flex. As a standard issue, TR80 is equipped with a quick-change hybrid pedal plate that allows you to race with your feet up (in formula position) or down in the GT position. The choice is yours and it’s included in the price!

settings.title: Rigid & ADJUSTABLE Wheel Plate
settings.description: Select the Trak Racer Wheel Plate to suit most belt-drive and direct drive wheels on the market. It’s full adjustable and won’t cause any flexing issues; no matter how much torque you want to punish it with!

settings.title: OPTIONALDUAL-LOCK SEAT SLIDER KIT
settings.description: The TR Premium seat slider runner kit will give you quick adjustments of the seat position and lock you in with the least amount of play.

settings.title: WHAT'S INCLUDED?
settings.description:
Universal wheel Mount / Pedal Mount – Hybrid Pedal System / BONUS Rubber Feet to protect floors / Set of Cable Ties
Coloured Dust Strips / All Mounting Screws, Brackets and Fixtures / Assembly Tool Kit Included
